product: Managed Iceberg materialized views are in Public Preview
tagline: You can now create a materialized view that is compatible with external Iceberg readers.
what_it_does: You can now create a materialized view that is compatible with external Iceberg readers. This feature is in Public Preview. To enable it, reach out to your Databricks account team.

capabilities.title: Partition evolution is supported on
capabilities.desc: Partition evolution is supported on managed Iceberg tables only when interacting from external Iceberg engines.

capabilities.title: Foreign Iceberg tables don't support
capabilities.desc: Foreign Iceberg tables don't support partition evolution.

capabilities.title: Partitioning by BINARY type isn't
capabilities.desc: Partitioning by BINARY type isn't supported. Views aren't accessible from external Iceberg engines.

key_takeaway: You can now create a materialized view that is compatible with external Iceberg readers.
